title: An End Decreed.
content:
Let's be jocund while we may,
    All things have an ending day;
    And when once the work is done,
    Fates revolve no flax they've spun.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "An End Decreed."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
